prompt:
PR #16 has merge conflicts after PR #17 (Radarr) was merged into main. Rebase this branch onto main and resolve all conflicts.

The conflicts will be in files that both PRs modified:
- internal/agent/agent.go — Agent struct, constructors (New, NewWithClient), dispatchTool switch, system prompt. Radarr added a `radarr` field; this PR adds `prowlarr`. Keep both.
- internal/agent/tools.go — allToolDefs, destructiveTools map, input structs. Radarr added its tools; keep both sets.
- internal/agent/agent_test.go — Mock structs and test functions. Radarr added mockRadarr; keep both mocks. Tests now need both mock fields.
- internal/config/config.go — Config struct, env overrides. Radarr added RadarrConfig; keep both.
- cmd/reel-life/main.go — Client initialization, agent.New() call. Both services added. Keep both, update agent.New() to pass all clients.

The goal: after resolving, the code should have Sonarr + Radarr + Prowlarr all working together. Run `go build ./...` and `go test ./...` to verify.
